actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT
    ID AS `ID`,
    DocumentID AS `Document ID`,
    LineNo AS `Line No`,
    ProductCode AS `Product Code`,
    Product AS `Product`,
    Barcode AS `Barcode`,
    Description AS `Description`,
    Unit AS `Unit`,
    Quantity AS `Quantity`,
    DeliveredQuantity AS `Delivered Quantity`,
    UnitPrice AS `Unit Price`,
    NetUnitPrice AS `Net Unit Price`,
    DiscountPercent AS `Discount %`,
    DiscountAmount AS `Discount Amount`,
    TaxCode AS `Tax Code`,
    TaxRate AS `Tax Rate`,
    TaxAmount AS `Tax Amount`,
    Total AS `Total`,
    SerialNumber AS `Serial Number`,
    BatchNumber AS `Batch Number`,
    ExpiryDate AS `Expiry Date`,
    LineStatus AS `Line Status`,
    Note AS `Note`
FROM DeliveryNoteItems
WHERE DocumentID = {{ tblDeliveryNotes.selectedRow.ID || 0 }} 
ORDER BY LineNo;
